response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performer as Otonose Kanade via video hashtag. 2. 00:00-00:27: Performance of '飛行艇' by King Gnu. Lyrics found and included. 3. 00:27-00:37: Instrumental interlude. 4. 00:37-03:52: Performance of 'ヴィーナス' credited to lyrics by Nanahoshi Orchestra and music by Iwami Riku. Full lyrics could not be found via web search. 5. 03:52-04:59: Closing talk.
response.global_summary: The video features Otonose Kanade performing two songs, '飛行艇' (Hikoutei) and 'ヴィーナス' (Venus), in a celebratory concert setting, interspersed with dance and a brief closing talk.

scenes.description: The song '飛行艇' is in progress as the video begins. The performer sings and dances on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どんな夢を見に行こうか 
正しさばかりに恐れ戦かないで 
自由自在に飛び回って 
ステップ・バイ・ステップ ビートを刻んで 
果ての無いパーティーを 続けようか 
この時代に飛び乗って 
今夜この街を飛び立って 
大空を飛び回って 
命揺らせ 命揺らせ 
この風に飛び乗って 
今夜台風の目となって 
大空を飛び回って 
命揺らせ 命揺らせ 
代わり映えがしない日常の片隅で 
無邪気に笑っていられたらいいよな 
無意味な旅を続けようか 
一歩ずつでいいさ 
歓声も罵声も 
呑み込んで 
この時代に飛び乗って 
今夜愚かな杭となって 
過ちを恐れないで 
命揺らせ 命揺らせ 
この風に飛び乗って 
今夜名も無き風となって 
清濁を併せ呑んで 
命揺らせ 命揺らせ 
大雨降らせ 
大地震わせ 
過去を祝え 
明日を担え 
命揺らせ 
命揺らせ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What kind of dream shall we go to see? 
Don't be afraid of just correctness 
Fly around freely 
Step by step,刻 under the beat 
Shall we continue the endless party? 
... (rest of the song lyrics omitted for brevity)

scenes.description: An instrumental dance interlude while the stage lighting changes.
The song 'ヴィーナス' begins. The performer sings with backup dancers. The title and credits appear on screen.
Closing talk by the performer, Otonose Kanade, thanking the audience and mentioning the concert title and hashtag.
